summary: Core PS logic (glob matching, label aggregation) follows conventions (Set-StrictMode, CmdletBinding, -LiteralPath). Workflow uses pinned actions and least-privilege. ISSUES: fragile script invocation detection ($MyInvocation checks fail with whitespace variance); test harness hard-codes workflow token checks that break if YAML changes; unused labels.txt output file (no artifact definition); test expectations hard-coded—breaks if rules.json changes; missing rules.json and Tests.ps1 files prevent execution.
